FOLDER.NAME: h1_shared
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: GBI HANA Shared Folder Primary: Vikram Chauhan Secondary: Veretta Schnackenberg

FOLDER.NAME: at_project
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: Appito Project Folder Primary: Sujatha Reddy Secondary: Atif Usman

MAPPING.DESCRIPTION: This mapping loads data from BW Datasource (ZJGLAPTIN) to Flat File (FF_AT_ZJ_GL_ACCOUNT)
MAPPING.NAME: m_FF_AT_ZJ_GL_ACCOUNT

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: --Replace double quotes messing up formatting REPLACESTR(1,in_GLEXR_ZJ,CHR(34),NULL)
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: out_GLEXR_ZJ

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Maximum Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Maximum Percentage of Total Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Additional Concurrent Pipelines for Lookup Cache Creation
Save session log for these runs
Session Log File Max Time Period

TASK.DESCRIPTION: Command to end ETL load process. FOR USE AS POST-SESSION FAILURE COMMAND
TASK.NAME: cmd_etl_end_fail

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails

TASK.DESCRIPTION: Command to initiate ETL load process. FOR USE AS A PRE-SESSION COMMAND.
TASK.NAME: cmd_etl_start

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails

TASK.DESCRIPTION: Command to end ETL load process. FOR USE AS POST-SESSION SUCCESS COMMAND
TASK.NAME: cmd_etl_end

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails

WORKFLOW.DESCRIPTION: Workflow to load target table FF_AT_ZJ_GL_ACCOUNT from BW DataSource table ZJGLAPTIN
WORKFLOW.NAME: wf_FF_AT_ZJ_GL_ACCOUNT

SESSION.DESCRIPTION: Session to load target table FF_AT_JDE from BW DataSource ZJGLAPTIN
SESSION.NAME: s_m_FF_AT_ZJ_GL_ACCOUNT

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Header Command
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: echo Account, Cost Center, Journal ID, Document Type, Journal Line ID, Vendor ID, Vendor Name, Account Description, Currency Code (Base), Currency Code (From), Journal Line Description, Remark Explanation, Subledger G/L, Purchase Order, Supplier Invoice, Posting Date, Fiscal Year/Period, Source ERP, Amount, Local Amount echo Account, Cost Center, Journal ID, Document Type, Journal Line ID, Vendor ID, Vendor Name, Account Description, Currency Code (Base), Currency Code (From), Journal Line Description, Remark Explanation, Subledger G/L, Purchase Order, Supplier Invoice, Posting Date, Fiscal Year/Period, Source ERP, Amount, Local Amount echo Account, Cost Center, Journal ID, Document Type, Journal Line ID, Vendor ID, Vendor Name, Account Description, Currency Code (Base), Currency Code (From), Journal Line Description, Remark Explanation, Subledger G/L, Purchase Order, Supplier Invoice, Posting Date, Fiscal Year/Period, Source ERP, Amount, Local Amount

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

TASKINSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Session to load target table FF_AT_JDE from BW DataSource ZJGLAPTIN
TASKINSTANCE.NAME: s_m_FF_AT_ZJ_GL_ACCOUNT

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_m_FF_AT_ZJ_GL_ACCOUNT.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_m_FF_AT_ZJ_GL_ACCOUNT.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_m_FF_AT_ZJ_GL_ACCOUNT.ErrorMsg

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Workflow Log File
Save workflow log for these runs
Allow concurrent run with unique run instance name
Allow concurrent run with same run instance name
Maximum number of concurrent runs per Hub

FOLDER.NAME: at_shared
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: Appito Shared Folder Primary: Sujatha Reddy Secondary: Atif Usman
